# Keys and their dependent trigger references remain valid for loaded vanilla script.

	age = age_1_traditions
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = SCA  always = no} # M8 disables vanilla
	requires = subjects_advance

	icon = dan_scanian_regiment
	
	global_crown_estate_power = 0.1
}

	potential = { has_or_had_tag = SCA  always = no} # M8 disables vanilla
	requires = government_size_renaissance
	icon = crown_power_advance_renaissance

}

	age = age_3_discovery

	potential = { has_or_had_tag = SCA  always = no} # M8 disables vanilla

	allow = { own_entire_province = province_definition:zealand_province }

	requires = merchant_power_from_maritime_discovery_advance

}

swedish_roots = {
	age = age_5_absolutism

	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		has_or_had_tag = SCA
		NOT = { has_or_had_tag = SWE } # Sweden-formed Scandinavia already has indelningsverket (+15% manpower); avoid double-dipping the identical bonus

	requires = military_revolution_advance
